aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Expected union discovery or registered coverage value.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Expected correct actions divided by actions.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Expected number of distinct actions.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Declared weighted union coverage.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Expected successful hits beyond the first.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Declared concentration of action shares.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Declared concentration of source exposure.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Model-defined reciprocal source concentration.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Registered frontier minus protocol discovery.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Smallest action budget recovering the comparator.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Expected declared source-acquisition cost.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Expected number of actions used.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Expected number of decision rounds.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Expected declared private payoff.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Discovery value net of declared information and transfer costs.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Expected external transfer budget.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Whether truthful reporting satisfies the registered incentive condition.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Whether recommended action satisfies the registered incentive condition.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Minimum truthful/obedient payoff advantage over registered deviations.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Number of agents using the public signal.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Number of agents whose action uses the public signal.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Discovery gain from the first public-signal user over private-only play.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Discovery loss from duplicate public-signal use relative to one user.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Planner optimum minus the registered voluntary-attention equilibrium.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Number of agents given access to the public signal.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Discovery loss relative to the optimal audience assignment.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Registered conditional policy used on disagreement.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Exact deterministic minimum-team planner discovery.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Expected count of candidates meeting the declared threshold.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Registered games whose worst weak pure equilibrium has zero discovery.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Registered games with no pairwise-strict-stable weak pure equilibrium.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Registered games with no exact-size-tau-strict-stable weak equilibrium.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Registered games where tied-mode uniform mixing is not an equilibrium.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Exact rows where the dynamic planner strictly exceeds autonomous play.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Fixed-budget cells where visibility lowers discovery and dispersion.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Cells where stopping strictly lowers expected actions.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Mechanism rows attaining the minimum-team planner portfolio.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Rows passing the declared strict-member pair-deviation check.

aggregation: task-level; family profiles and Pareto vectors only
definition: Exact pure-equilibrium count or fixture-ordered count vector.
